urdu transliteration text:
AY MERE BABAJAAN
English Transliteration
@HujjatELC
Ay Mere Babajaan- OH MY DEAREST FATHER

Ay Mere Babajaan, Horahi Hai Azaan,
Sar Chhupaun Kaha
Agaya Karvaan
@HujjatELC
Ay Mere Babajaan- OH MY DEAREST FATHER
english translation text:
Majmaye Aam Me, Be Watan Be Amaan
O MY FATHER, THE AZAAN IS BEING RECITED, WHERE SHALL I HIDE MY HEAD?
IN THIS HUGE CROWD, AWAY FROM HOME AND NO PROTECTION, THE CARAVAN HAS ARRIVED

urdu transliteration text:
Me Bhi Hun Marziya, Binte Khayrun Nisa
Mere Lehje Me Hai, Baba Teri Ada
Naam Zainab Mera, Tune Jo Rakhdiya
Day Di Apni Zubaan
I AM MARZIYA, DAUGHTER OF FATIMA,
@HujjatELC
Ay Mere Babajaan- OH MY DEAREST FATHER
english translation text:
IN MY ACTIONS, I AM LIKE YOU MY FATHER,
YOU NAMED ME ZAINAB AND TAUGHT ME HOW TO SPEAK

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Ay Mere Babajaan- OH MY DEAREST FATHER
english translation text: Haath Kano Pe Hai, Neel Gaalon Pe Hai, Aur Nishan Jo Sakina Ke Shaano Pe HaiHar Nishan Se Yahi, Aa Rahi Hai SadaBabajaan BabajaanSHE HAD HER HANDS ON HER EARS, AND HAD MARKS ON HER CHEEKS,THERE ARE MARKS ON SAKINA’S SHOULDERS,EVERY WOUND OF HERS IS CRYING OUT, O’ FATHER O’ FATHER

I DID NOT ASK FOR MY DUES OF FIDAK
THE PEACE OF MY MOTHER’S HEART IS IN MY VEIL
LISTEN O CRUEL WORLD!

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Ay Mere Babajaan- OH MY DEAREST FATHER
english translation text: Babajaan Ye Tera Akhri Tha Bayan, Teri Chadar Bachayega Ghazi JawaanMargaya Bawafa, Chingayi Hai Rida,Kehti Hai BibiyaTHIS WAS YOUR LAST WORD OH BELOVED FATHER,THAT MY VEIL WILL BE PROTECTED BY ABBAS,THE PROTECTOR HAS BEEN KILLED, THE VEIL HAS BEEN SNATCHED,AND THE LADIES ARE CALLING OUT...

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
Ay Mere Babajaan- OH MY DEAREST FATHER
english translation text: Kal Thi Maa Aaj Me Bhi Hun Darbar Me, Misle Zahra Khari Hun Me Aghyar Me,Us Taraf Hai Shaqi, Is Taraf RehgayiBepadar BetiyanYESTERDAY IT WAS MY MOTHER, TODAY I AM IN THE COURT,JUST LIKE ZAHRA, I AM STANDING NOW IN FRONT OF STRANGERSON ONE SIDE THE OPPRESSOR AND ON THE OTHER SIDE ARE THE ORPHANED DAUGHTERS
